text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stands are full of fans ready to watch the
BNW showdown.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see them! I've been a fan since the
Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
That was such a legendary race! I cry every time I
watch the video.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
It's been a year and a half since then... I wonder
how much they've improved!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay, you two—here we go! The ARIMA!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: KINEEEEEEEEEEN!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? Come on, say it with me!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Must we?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, to get ourselves all hyped! You know,
huddle up and motivate each other!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll pass.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat? Today's the Arima Kinen, guys!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, but I don't intend to get you any more
energetic than you already are.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Even small factors that could aid your victory
must be avoided.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Exactly.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aw, come oooon!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Fine! I get you're both serious! But I don't wanna
lose either, you know?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'll just get pumped by myself! And I'll win too!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haha... Yes, that's the spirit.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: We'll see who wins.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: YEAH! Now this is some real competition!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I call out to the only person yelling in their little
gang of three.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Come to see me off?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Keep your eyes wide open! Today I'm gonna get
one heck of a victory!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Then you'll be inspired to dream big too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can't help but smile at her brave declaration.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's time, Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The buzz of excitement outside for the race is
tangible.
choice_data_list: (Go and show them a real BNW race!)
(Go and show them a real BNW race!)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: HERE WE GOOO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: They dash away...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...and the audience welcomes BNW with an
explosion of cheers!
